name: 因果与影响
description: 表达变量之间因果关系、影响机制的各类表达

expressions.note: 最基础、覆盖面广，适合不想强调方向或机制时使用
expressions.example: Family resources affect students' transition into higher education.

expressions.note: 强调逐步塑造和方向性影响，比 affect 更有结构感
expressions.example: Parental expectations shape adolescents' educational aspirations.

expressions.note: 突出影响受到制度或情境约束，适合理论讨论
expressions.example: Gender norms condition how income translates into bargaining power.

expressions.note: 较书面，强调相关性和理论关联，因果语气较含蓄
expressions.example: These arrangements bear on women's labor force participation.

clusters.meaning: X对Y有影响（名词用法：the effect/impact of）

expressions.en: the effect of X on Y
expressions.note: 最标准、最中性，适合结果报告和模型解释
expressions.example: We estimate the effect of job loss on fertility intentions.

expressions.en: the impact of X on Y
expressions.note: 比 effect 更强调实际后果，常用于政策或宏观变化
expressions.example: The study examines the impact of childcare access on employment.

expressions.en: the role of X in Y
expressions.note: 强调 X 在过程中的作用，不必预设单一因果方向
expressions.example: The paper considers the role of peers in college choice.

expressions.en: the bearing of X on Y
expressions.note: 更抽象、更理论化，适合讨论概念之间的关联
expressions.example: We discuss the bearing of kinship ties on migration decisions.

expressions.note: 通用且语气适中，适合描述清晰但不夸张的结果链条
expressions.example: Job instability can lead to delayed household formation.

expressions.note: 强调新现象的产生，比 lead to 更有过程感
expressions.example: Educational expansion gave rise to new forms of inequality.

expressions.note: 强调解释某一差异或结果，常用于分解和机制分析
expressions.example: Occupational segregation accounts for part of the wage gap.

expressions.note: 语气强，突出触发突然变化，适合危机或转折场景
expressions.example: Economic shocks precipitated a sharp decline in migration.

clusters.meaning: X是通过Z机制影响Y的（中介路径）

expressions.note: 强调机制作为作用通道，适合机制检验的总述
expressions.example: Class background operates through school quality and peer networks.

expressions.note: 语气较解释性，适合逐步说明中介路径
expressions.example: Policy effects work by way of reduced childcare costs.

expressions.note: 最贴近统计中介分析，适合报告模型结果
expressions.example: The association is mediated by access to stable employment.

expressions.note: 突出把某种资源或压力导向结果，动感更强
expressions.example: Local institutions channel migration experience into civic participation.

clusters.meaning: X调节/缓冲了Z对Y的影响（调节效应）

expressions.en: moderate the association between X and Y
expressions.note: 最标准的统计写法，适合交互项和异质性检验
expressions.example: Gender moderates the association between education and earnings.

expressions.en: buffer the effect of X on Y
expressions.note: 强调削弱负面影响，常用于资源或支持系统
expressions.example: Family support buffers the effect of unemployment on wellbeing.

expressions.en: condition the relationship between X and Y
expressions.note: 比 moderate 更理论化，强调关系依赖于情境
expressions.example: Local norms condition the relationship between income and fertility.

expressions.en: alter the strength of the association
expressions.note: 直接描述强弱变化，适合解释交互项方向
expressions.example: Urban residence alters the strength of the education gradient.

expressions.en: a consequence of X is Y
expressions.note: 结构清楚、语气中性，适合引出结果段落
expressions.example: A consequence of delayed marriage is a shorter reproductive window.

expressions.note: 强调延伸意义，不必限定为直接后果
expressions.example: Rising debt has implications for young adults' family formation.

expressions.note: 比 has consequences 更书面，强调后果随 X 而来
expressions.example: School closure carries consequences for parental employment.

expressions.en: X leaves Y more vulnerable to Z
expressions.note: 适合负面后果，突出后续风险而非即时结果
expressions.example: Informal work leaves families more vulnerable to income shocks.

expressions.note: 强调已有差异或效应被放大，适合不平等研究
expressions.example: School tracking amplifies class differences in achievement.

expressions.note: 强调负面问题被加重，语气比 amplify 更强
expressions.example: Housing costs exacerbate economic insecurity among migrants.

expressions.note: 突出规模或可见度变大，常用于差距和风险
expressions.example: Digital exclusion magnifies educational disparities.

expressions.note: 强调多个劣势叠加，适合累积不平等语境
expressions.example: Care responsibilities compound women's employment penalties.

expressions.note: 统计和学术写作中常用，强调效应强度下降
expressions.example: The coefficient attenuates after adding family background controls.

expressions.note: 语气较形象，强调冲击或变化幅度被压低
expressions.example: Public transfers dampen the effect of unemployment on poverty.

expressions.note: 强调主动缓解负面影响，常用于政策或干预
expressions.example: Childcare subsidies mitigate mothers' employment constraints.

expressions.note: 语气更强，突出削弱原本尖锐的影响
expressions.example: Union coverage blunts the wage penalty associated with part-time work.
